author: KreNtal
description: This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff. Automatically fetches metadata from a url and makes it as a card-styled link.

manifest.author: KreNtal
manifest.description: Automatically fetches metadata from a url and makes it as a card-styled link.
manifest.name: Auto Card Link Enhanced

name: Auto Card Link Enhanced

releases.description:
## Fixes
Fixes for Obsidian Community plugin release.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Fixes
+ Fixes for Reddit fetch.
+ Fixes for Obsidian Community plugin release.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Fixes
+ Fixes for Obsidian Community plugin release.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Additions
+ Added channel name for YouTube channels and playlists.
+ Added "Playlist" as duration for YouTube Playlists.
+ Added "Live" as duration for Twitch Lives.
+ Added an option to choose YouTube thumbnail size.
## Improvements
+ Improved Printables fetch.
+ Improved image fetch.
+ Improved duration label syling.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Additions
+ Added author for YouTube, Vimeo, and every other video provider, Reddit (subreddit) and other links that supports an author.
+ Added a queue notification when trying to refresh multiple cards.
## Fixes
+ Fixed card selection when Deleting, Refreshing etc. it is not consistent everytime.
## Improvements
+ Improved fetching from Github repo, Wikipedia pages and Spotify links.
+ Improved fetching from Reddit.
+ Improved fetching from Twitch.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Additions
+ Added an option in settings to prepend a new line before the cardlink (as in the original version but now is optional)
+ Added an option to add a new line after the cardlink in context menu (useful for documents full of cardlinks with no empty lines)
+ Added author as field for mainly videos (YouTube, Twitch, Vimeo, Dailymotion, TED)
+ Vimeo, Dailymotion, Twitch VODs and TED video duration is now supported.
## Fixes
+ Fixed Twitch fetch (both live, clips and videos/vods)
+ Fixes for Glass theme in Obsidian Light mode
## Improvements
+ Improved Reddit images fetch
+ Improved copy button and edit block button to better support left and right image

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
### Additions
- Added comprehensive character encoding support for non-UTF-8 (thanks to @https://github.com/sayzard)
- Added option to saves both favicon and images locally and the option to choose where to save them (thanks to @https://github.com/odie5533)
### Fixes
- Fix Obsidian closes itself when clicking card link. (thanks to @https://github.com/Endermanbugzjfc)
### Appearance
- Added settings to change card style/theme
- Fixed Glass theme on Obsidian Light Theme

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
### Additions
- Context menu voices are now only showed when they need to
- Added a context menu option to delete the Card Link
### Improvements
- Fixed thumbnail broken on mobile
- Improved image fetching when images are not reachable

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
### Additions
- Added a context menu to refetch the current hovering card
### Improvements
- Added YouTube video duration in the thumbnail
- Improved various fetching methods

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
### Fetch Issues
- Better handling of YouTube links
- Better handling of Reddit links
- Better handling of IMDb links
- Better image fetching (Amazon and Printables now work)
- Better handling of errors on fetch: A simple card will be shown instead of nothing
### Appearance
- Added settings to display thumbnail on left or right (left by default)
- Tweaked appearance to be more modern/rounded
- Removed initial linebreak, added margins
